# integrationIntercom

Integrates the organization with Intercom.

## Signature

- Root: `Mutations`
- Return Type: [`IntegrationPayload`](../objects/integration_payload-object.md)!

## Arguments

| Name | Type | Default | Deprecated | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `code` | [`String`](../scalars/string-scalar.md)! | `n/a` | No | The Intercom OAuth code. |
| `domainUrl` | [`String`](../scalars/string-scalar.md) | `n/a` | No | The Intercom domain URL to use for the integration. Defaults to app.intercom.com if not provided. |
| `redirectUri` | [`String`](../scalars/string-scalar.md)! | `n/a` | No | The Intercom OAuth redirect URI. |
